title: PLUS ULTRA
description:
One tap. Beyond your limits.

PLUS ULTRA is a one-tap pixel art 2D action game where you dash through oncoming blocks with split-second timing.

Simple controls, deep strategy.

Read the distance to each block and dash at the last possible moment. Chain EXCELLENT judgments to push your score multiplier higher. Graze past blocks for bonus points. Every split-second decision matters.

------ 9 Unique Characters ------Each character has different HP, dash speed, and unique abilities.

A dual-ability system with both passive and active skills. Your character choice shapes your score attack strategy.

------ 3 Game Modes ------ENDLESS — How long can you survive as the scroll speed keeps accelerating? In TEAM ENDLESS, form a team of 3 characters. Swap between them, manage stamina, and chain relay bonuses for the highest score.

STAGE — 48 stages in total. Clear 3 missions per stage (No Miss / Score / Full Combo) and collect stars.

CLASSIC — Pure skill-based competition with fixed stats. Feel the tension as gimmicks switch every 15 blocks.

------ Features ------One-Tap Controls — Simple enough for anyone to pick up, but true mastery is a real challenge.

Pixel Art Graphics — Pixel art meets mecha UI. Retro and futuristic collide.

Combo System — Three-tier judgments: EXCELLENT / GOOD / BAD. Keep your combo going to raise your score multiplier.

Graze Bonus — Score bonus points by grazing past blocks.

Online Rankings — Compete against players from around the world.

60 Trophies — Plenty of content for dedicated players.

3 Languages — Japanese, English, and Korean.

------ Who Is This For? ------You love timing-based gameplay like rhythm games.

You love retro games and pixel art aesthetics.

You're looking for a quick arcade game to pick up and play anytime.

You love score attacks and climbing the rankings.

You enjoy the strategy of character builds and team composition.
description_short: A one-tap, high-tempo 2D action runner about pushing past your limits. Race through 8 block shapes with 9 unique characters across Endless, Stage, and Classic modes.
